title: How to install latest podman on s390x - docker-archive doesn't support digest references issue
body:
Wanted to know how to install podman latest version in s390x.

Right now getting error Error: error getting Docker archive ImageReference for "bundle_staging_394747874/bundle.tar:.............": docker-archive doesn't support digest references

comments.body:
Please follow the requested issue template and provide the data along with a reproducer. It seems that you installed Podman successfully on an s390x machine.

The error message refers to (https://github.com/containers/image/blob/master/docs/containers-transports.5.md#docker-archivepathdocker-reference): docker-archive references must not contain digests.

Can you share which kind of archive you are attempting to load and the command line?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@apasrini Is this still an issue?  We have had no feed back in over a month?
Since no information, closing, reopen if further info becomes available.
